headline: Asia session opens mixed; tech leads on AI capex revisions
body: Regional indices opened cautiously after weekend macro prints; semis outperformed on a 2026 capex upgrade from a major hyperscaler.

headline: ECB minutes signal patience on cuts despite softening core CPI
body: Doves remain a minority. Markets pared back rate-cut bets at the front end; bunds steepened modestly.

headline: Brent edges higher into European open on tighter physical signals
body: Spreads firmed, refinery margins rebounded; little response from energy equities so far.

headline: Crypto majors range-bound ahead of US CPI
body: Funding remains positive but small; perp basis compressed across exchanges overnight.

headline: Banks lead European open as curve steepens
body: Senior unsecured spreads tightened 2–3bp; earnings season expectations have crept higher into next week.

headline: EUR/USD stalls at the 1.10 zone; flow desk reports option-related demand
body: Topside vol bid into NFP; risk reversals less skewed than a month ago.

headline: Industrials downgraded at a major sell-side house
body: Cited freight rate normalization and softer order books in EMEA; underweight for the next two quarters.

headline: Gold consolidates after weekend record; physical premiums steady
body: ETF flows turned modestly positive; central-bank demand remains the dominant narrative.

headline: US futures grind higher as yields ease pre-data
body: Small-caps lagging; breadth narrowed late in the European morning.

headline: Watchlist: a chip-equipment name reports after the close
body: Buy-side expectations: in-line revenue, gross margin focus, color on 2027 capex visibility.
